outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit features a black quilted dress layered over dark blue jeans, combining texture and structure. Paired with beige leather ballet flats and a floral leather tote, it delivers a sophisticated yet approachable look suitable for an autumn evening event. The ensemble balances warmth and style seamlessly.

model_attributes.body: Slender youthful physique with long hair, calm expression, and poised presence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing straight with relaxed arms, neutral facial expression, holding a handbag naturally.
model_attributes.background: Historic amphitheater setting with a live jazz band, soft ambient lighting, audience seated on ground.

styling_techniques.P01081092: Layered over jeans, dress worn as outerwear
